texto: I’m not interested in external ego but internal satisfaction. I’m not interested just in easy glory but in constructing something….together we are trying to build a project that is not just short term
explicacao: Citação de manuel pellegrini sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I’m not interested in external ego but internal satisfaction. I’m not interested just in easy glo…” articula reflexao, vision, interested em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
